meta.title: Safety in Process Control
meta.description:
3-minutes of highlights from Bryan Singer's session on Safety in Process Control. This is one of the most misunderstood topics in ICS / OT. It's fast. Take a quick look. If it is new info to you then you need to dig in deeper if you are involved in securing ICS or ICS related risk decisions.

Regrettably we don't have the video from Bryan. You just see the Powerpoint slides in these clips.
